response.justification: Bogdan has over 10 years of full-stack experience with strong alignment to the required stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React, Docker) and deep expertise in AI-agent infrastructure, testing, and cloud-native tooling — plus demonstrable leadership in architecture and process improvement. His open-source contributions and workshop leadership reflect exceptional communication and technical depth, though his lack of explicit Nest.js and Vitest experience is a minor gap.
strengths: 10+ years of full-stack experience across diverse tech stacks and domains
Proven expertise in AI-agent development and internal tooling infrastructure
Strong advocacy for testing, CI/CD, and engineering best practices with open-source contributions
concerns: No explicit mention of Nest.js or Vitest in resume (though Node.js and Jest experience implies adaptability)
Limited evidence of direct PostgreSQL/MySQL production use (MongoDB and DLang focus more prominent)
German language proficiency is only basic, may impact collaboration in Berlin-based team
